Function for handling tests

Source: R/cohort_contrast_tests.R
handleTests.Rd

Function for handling tests

Usage

handleTests(
  data,
  targetCohortId,
  presenceFilter,
  runChi2YTests = TRUE,
  runLogitTests = TRUE,
  numCores = parallel::detectCores() - 1
)

Arguments

data

Data list object

targetCohortId

Target cohort id

presenceFilter

numeric > if set, removes all features represented less than the given percentage

runChi2YTests

Boolean for running the CHI2Y test (chi-squared test for two proportions with Yates continuity correction).

runLogitTests

boolean for logit-tests

On this page
